Appearances via Zoom Conference
GABRIEL LEE-SANCHEZ, ESQ., KEESAL, YOUNG & LOGAN (415) 398-6000 gabriel.lee-sanchez@kyl.com
Attorneys for Petitioners WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC, WELLS FARGO ADVISORS FINANCIAL NETWORK, LLC, AND FRANK WU
No other appearances.

Not contested. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC, WELLS FARGO ADVISORS FINANCIAL NETWORK, LLC, AND FRANK WU's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners' unopposed Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award and Judgment on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award are granted. Exhibit J to Declaration of Gabriel Lee-Sanchez is stricken, as it appears unrelated to the instant matter.

Order is signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
